zh.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann是Georgius Witmans的兒子，於大約1576年出生在德國爾特波格梅爾根海姆利希特爾沃爾可斯費爾登。他於1598年1月31日與Barbara Kosels在德國爾特波格格拉布洛倫格拉布洛倫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他埋葬在德國爾特波格梅爾根海姆利希特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann是Georgius Witmans的儿子，于大约1576年出生在德国爾特波格梅爾根海姆利希特爾沃爾可斯費爾登。他于1598年1月31日与Barbara Kosels在德国爾特波格格拉布洛倫格拉布洛倫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他埋葬在德国爾特波格梅爾根海姆利希特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Widmann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Reinhard, Armin, Christoph, Gerhard, Klaus.
South German: status name from Middle High German widem(e) ‘prebend’ (church-owned property in the form of land, a farm, etc. for agricultural use, mostly to support the village priest) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Wiedemann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Otto, Claus, Elke, Ernst, Franz, Friederike, Fritz, Gerd, Guenter, Gunter.
North German: topographic name for someone living near willow trees, from Middle Low German wide ‘willow’ + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Widman
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element wid- (possibly from Old Swedish vithr ‘wood, forest’, or from a placename formed with Old Swedish vīd ‘wide’) + man ‘man’, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with the element wid-.
Americanized form of South German   Widmann  .

nameMeanings.name: Leonhardt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Blend of Latin Leo(n)- and Germanic hard ‘strong, hardy’.

en.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann was born about 1576, in Wolkersfelden, Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Germany as the son of Georgius Witmans. He married Barbara Kosels on 31 January 1598, in Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He was buried in Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann est né environ 1576, à Wolkersfelden, Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Allemagne, fils de Georgius Witmans. Il a épousé Barbara Kosels le 31 janvier 1598, à Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Ilenterré à Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann wurde um 1576 in Wolkersfelden, Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Deutschland, als Sohn von Georgius Witmans geboren. Er hat am 31. Januar 1598 in Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Deutschland Barbara Kosels geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er wurde in Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann è nato il circa 1576 nel Wolkersfelden, Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Germania come figlio di Georgius Witmans. Lui sposato Barbara Kosels il 31 gennaio 1598, nel Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolto a Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmannは約1576年にドイツウuルッテンバーグメルジェンスエイムリチテルウオルケルスフエルデンでGeorgius Witmansの息子として生まれた。1598年1月31日にドイツウuルッテンバーグジャーアブロンジャーアブロンでBarbara Koselsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はドイツウuルッテンバーグメルジェンスエイムリチテルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann(은)는 대략 1576년 독일 wu르테버그 머전테임 리ch텔 울커스펠든에서 Georgius Witmans의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1598년 1월 31일 독일 wu르테버그 제라브론 제라브론에서 Barbara Kosels(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 독일 wu르테버그 머전테임 리ch텔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann nasceu aproximadamente 1576, em Wolkersfelden, Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Alemanha filho de Georgius Witmans. Ele casou-se com Barbara Kosels em 31 de janeiro de 1598, em Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele foi sepultado em Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann родился около 1576 г. в местности волкирсфелден, личтел, миржентим, вuрттембирг, Германия. Его отца звали Georgius Witmans. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Kosels 31 января 1598 г. в местности джирабронн, джирабронн, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он был похоронен в местности личтел, миржентим, вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Leonhardt Widmann nació aproximadamente 1576, en Wolkersfelden, Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Alemania como hijo de Georgius Witmans. Se casó con Barbara Kosels el 31 de enero de 1598, en Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Fue sepultado en Lichtel, Mergentheim, Württemberg, Alemania.
